+ "%@ %s scoreboard update %s by %s"
+ "%@ Not showing shelf because playhead is still in broadcast end range and we have already displayed that shelf"
+ "%@ Not showing shelf because playhead is still in game end range and we have already displayed that shelf"
+ "%@ hideEvent is false for %s based on clock score response, removing it from `nonLive` set as this event is currently live"
+ "%@ hideEvent is true, queryAgain is false for %s, removing it from both `cachedItems` and `nonLive` sets as this event x permanently ended"
+ "%@ hideEvent is true, queryAgain is true for %s, adding it to `nonLive` set since this event can become live in future"
+ "%@ no cached item found for %s, skipping scoreboard update"
+ "%@ no scores in update for %s"
+ "%s presentAccountMessageIfPossible: view not visible, deferring Solarium palette to didAppear"
+ "%s shouldEnableNavMinimizeBehavior: result=%{bool}d isRoot=%{bool}d isNotPresenting=%{bool}d"
